scripts.minify:js: terser assets/js/lazyload.js --compress --mangle --output assets/js/lazyload.min.js && terser assets/js/main.js --compress --mangle --output assets/js/main.min.js && terser assets/js/site.js --compress --mangle --output assets/js/site.min.js
scripts.build: npm run minify:js && bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.dev: npm run minify:js && bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload
